name: Desk Fan

Seeking a small desk fan to improve home ventilation

name: Rice cooker
description: Family of three, comprising a single mother and her two school-going children. The mother has set up a home-based bakery business to supplement the family's income and is working hard towards clearing their outstanding debts. However, her rice cooker has recently broken down and she is unable to afford a replacement. Family would appreciate donation of a rice cooker to support the home-based business. Thank you.

contact.org: MSF Social Service Office @ Toa Payoh
contact.name: Regina Pua

passiton.name: Stainless Steel Rice Cooker
passiton.description: Preloved Stainless Steel Rice Cooker. Have been unused for a some time after parents in law moved in with me. This has been tested to work. I have 2 rice cookers. So rather than throw these away, this can still be used. We have used it during festive occasions when hosting extended family where we cooked rice for the whole extended family.

name: Bed & Mattress
description: Client is a 19-year-old single mother caring for her 16-month-old child. She recently moved out to live independently after leaving an abusive former partner and a financially abusive family environment. Client is currently repaying debts from her previous relationship while supporting herself and her child. Support will help her meet her family's immediate needs as she works towards financial stability.

passiton.name: Hospital bed with air mattress
passiton.description: Hospital bed with air mattress. Still functioning

passiton.name: Convertible Solid Wood Toddler Bed / Cot Bed with Mattress- White
passiton.description:
Beautiful solid wood convertible toddler bed in excellent condition. This bed was converted from a cot and includes a safety guard rail, making it perfect for toddlers transitioning from a crib to their first "big kid" bed.

Fits a standard cot/crib mattress (mattress not included unless otherwise stated).

Features:

Solid wood construction
White finish
Toddler safety guard rail
Low height for easy and safe access
Sturdy and well built
Neutral design to suit any nursery or child's bedroom

Well cared for in a smoke-free home. Minor signs of normal use only.  Mattress and sheet included.
passiton.location: Bayshore, Bedok, Chai Chee, Eastwood, Kew Drive, Upper East Coast

name: Shoe Rack
description:
Donor Request: Shoe Rack
A family of four living in a rental 2-room flat in Yishun is in need of a new or used shoe rack.
The household comprises a husband (58), his wife (54), and their two adult sons (aged 22 and 20), who are currently serving National Service. As the family does not own a shoe rack, their footwear tends to pile up outside the flat entrance, creating a cluttered and disorganised space.
This is a particular concern for the wife, who is a stroke survivor and relies on a wheelchair and walker to get around. Clutter near the entrance poses a real safety risk for her when entering and leaving the home, and having a shoe rack would go a long way in keeping the area clear and safe.
The husband is the family's sole breadwinner, working as a private hire vehicle driver. As his income can be variable, and with his wife unable to work due to her condition, the family has limited means to purchase household items on their own.
A donated shoe rack, whether new or used, would make a meaningful difference in supporting a safer and more comfortable home environment for this family. Your generosity would be deeply appreciated.
Required dimensions: Height up to 1m, width up to 1.5m, depth up to 0.3m
specifications: Height up to 1m, width up to 1.5m, depth up to 0.3m
